productDisplayName: Gas Men Skate Green Casual Shoes
description: Have fun choosing from the collection of sneakers from gas. This casual shoe has a great skateboarding look with it's chunky white sole and prominent Gas branding. The tartan fabric in green, navy and white will draw all eyes to your feet and ensure you are the envy of all your friends. Perfect for guys who want to keep their stylish street cred. Upper Suede leather and textile upper with fabric lining Padded tongue, collar and heel support and a fabric lining Central lace-up system for snug Fit Cushioned footbed for in-step cushioning Midsole Eva midsole for responsive cushioning and shock absorption Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Brand badge on back heel for style Outsole Durable rubber outsole with herringbone grooves for maximum grip and traction Shoe care Do not store in direct sunlight Remove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
